expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly targets the focus: "aligns with the Phase 6 contract and explicitly targets a final quality pass focused on layering and executable wording." It cites Phase 6 evidence for layering ("review-rubric-phase6.md → Final Layering defines the required layering stack") and executable wording ("reference.md → Validators includes: validate_executable_steps" and Phase 6 gate requires "executable-step checks").

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase6
expectations.evidence: result.md states "Phase alignment: Phase 6 (Final Quality Pass)" and concludes "does align with the Phase 6 contract." execution_notes.md also notes it "Verified primary phase = phase6 alignment via SKILL.md Phase 6 section and reference.md Phase 6 phase gate."
